message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="kent-beck" color="green" summary="Already reviewed, recap of 1 minor fix needed">
Luca, I've already reviewed all the files and sent my detailed review. To recap:

**1 Minor item (should fix before commit):**
- `WaitingOnPersonError` at `src/domain/waiting_for_item.rs:36` needs `PartialEq` added to its derive. Every other domain error type in the project has it. Change line 36 from `#[derive(Debug, Clone, thiserror::Error)]` to `#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, thiserror::Error)]`.

**1 Nice-to-have (can defer):**
- Missing integration tests for edit validation errors (empty title/person during edit -> 422).

Once the Minor fix is applied, I'm at full consensus. Everything else is excellent.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Kent, the `PartialEq` fix was already applied — see my previous message. Line 36 now reads `#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, thiserror::Error)]`. Your approval is confirmed.

Waiting on Scott, Lea, and Heydon to verify their fixes and confirm approval.
